# Mach-1 evidence images

This directory is **intentionally empty** in v0.

It will hold the real fringe-evidence packet referenced by
[`../mach-1.md`](../mach-1.md) — apparatus layout, bright/dark output frames, and
the fitted-fringe figure — once those measurements are acquired on the bench. No
placeholder or stand-in images are committed here, so that nothing on the build
page can be mistaken for data it is not.

Expected files (names referenced by `mach-1.md`):
`mach-1-layout.*`, `output-bright.*`, `output-dark.*`, `fringe-fit.*`.
